## Gateway Portals
- **MP Districts Master Index**: https://mpdistricts.nic.in — Gateway to all 55 district-level websites

## URL Patterns
- NIC hosted: `{districtname}.nic.in` (e.g., bhopal.nic.in)
- State hosted: `{districtname}.mp.gov.in` (e.g., bhopal.mp.gov.in)
